# LV Athletics Nation

## About
Independent long-form coverage of the Oakland Athletics relocation saga -- honoring fifty-seven years of Oakland baseball, documenting the Sacramento transitional chapter, and covering the Las Vegas era beginning in 2028.

## Site
- Homepage: https://lvathleticsnation.com
- Blog index: https://lvathleticsnation.com/blog

## Coverage Areas
- Oakland A's history and legacy (1968-2024)
- Howard Terminal stadium negotiations
- John Fisher ownership analysis
- Sacramento residency at Sutter Health Park (2025-2026)
- Las Vegas stadium construction and politics
- Nevada public funding deal ($380M)
- Las Vegas Athletics trademark dispute
- A's farm system and player development
- Oakland fan community and grief
- MLB relocation history and precedent
- Las Vegas as a sports city

## Blog Posts

/blog/complete-story-as-relocation-oakland-to-vegas
The complete relocation story: failed Oakland ballpark deals, Fisher's decision, the MLB vote, and the Las Vegas future.

/blog/oakland-grief-losing-your-baseball-team
What it feels like when your city loses its baseball team. Oakland fans on identity, loss, and moving on.

/blog/sacramento-pit-stop-inside-athletics-temp-home
Inside the A's two-year stay at Sutter Health Park: a Triple-A stadium hosting a big league team.

/blog/las-vegas-athletics-trademark-battle
The USPTO denied the A's trademark for Las Vegas Athletics. What happened and what it means.

/blog/how-las-vegas-stadium-got-built
The $380M Nevada public funding deal, the politics, and how the ballpark on the Strip got approved.

/blog/history-athletics-franchise-philadelphia-to-vegas
From Connie Mack's Philadelphia dynasty to Oakland to Las Vegas: the complete franchise history.

/blog/oakland-fans-who-will-never-forgive
Profiles of Oakland fans who are done with the team for good.

/blog/what-as-move-means-for-mlb
The first MLB relocation since 2005: what it signals about small markets and the future of baseball geography.

/blog/rise-and-fall-oakland-coliseum
The Oakland Coliseum: from one of baseball's finest venues to its worst.

/blog/who-is-really-to-blame-as-leaving-oakland
Assigning responsibility: Fisher, Oakland, the fans, MLB. An honest accounting.

/blog/oakland-as-fan-guide-grief-moving-on
For Oakland fans still processing: the stages of losing your team and what comes next.

/blog/john-fisher-most-hated-owner-baseball
How John Fisher became the most publicly despised owner in professional sports.

/blog/as-farm-system-building-for-vegas
The A's farm system and who is coming for the Las Vegas era.

/blog/how-las-vegas-became-sports-town
The Golden Knights, the Raiders, and now the A's: how Las Vegas became a real sports city.

/blog/sacramento-mlb-expansion-dream
Sacramento's expansion team hopes: history, realistic assessment, and the A's residency factor.

## Affiliate Disclosure
This site uses affiliate links to Fanatics and StubHub (tag: lvathleticsnation-20).
We may earn a commission when readers purchase through our links, at no additional cost to them.
